PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?parkLabel WHERE {
  ?park wdt:P31 wd:Q291913 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q48 ; rdfs:label ?parkLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?parkLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?parkLabel)) , 'redwood'))
}
